case_title: LORI'S DINER INTERNATIONAL, INC. VS. MARCELLO FLORIO

docket_entries.description: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF LORI'S DINER INTERNATIONAL, INC. OR DEFENDANT MARCELLO FLORIA. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
